data.narrative: Marie is a 21-year-old female working as a professional. They have vocational or technical level education and very poor health. They live as: single parent. They own a car.

encounters.contact_narrative: Patricia is a 45-year-old female working as a manager. They have secondary or less level education and very good health. They live as: single parent. They own a car.
